summary: FPV drones destroyed a Russian TOS-1A MLRS after it was first damaged by a Bulava loitering munition, with the vehicle later finished off by multiple FPV strikes. In the Kharkiv region, Rosgvardia fiber optic specialists conducted a night operation to destroy a Ukrainian Bogdan self-propelled artillery unit, breaching its cover and confirming the kill. The Rubicon Center reported 112 enemy targets destroyed on April 20, including Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs, with unmanned systems making up 36.7% of their total 24,000+ recorded kills. Ukrainian forces from the 35th Marine Brigade and the 66th Mechanized Brigade conducted successful counter-UAS and casualty evacuation operations, while Russian soldiers were killed by FPV drones during assaults and after attempting to feign surrender.
